report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides covering TON DeFi Ecosystem and Sui DeFi Ecosystem with full SEO optimization, structured data, and interactive content sections.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: TON Blockchain: TVL ~$150-300M, 1B+ Telegram users, exclusive Mini Apps blockchain, $558M PIPE investment, $1.43B USDt issued, 4.86% staking yields, STON.fi ($6B cumulative volume), DeDust ($301M TVL), EVAA ($1.4B processed)

Sui Blockchain: TVL hit $2.6B ATH (220% YoY growth), Move language with object-centric model, 100K+ TPS, <400ms latency, sub-$0.01 fees, Suilend ($745M), Navi ($723M), Momentum ($551M, 249% monthly growth), suiUSDe launched Feb 2026
Both chains identified as high-impact content gaps — zero existing coverage despite being top-10 ecosystems by activity

sections.title: Content Created
items: TON DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 (800+ lines): 8 sections covering protocol overview, top DeFi protocols (STON.fi, DeDust, EVAA, Storm Trade, Tonstakers, Bemo), Telegram Mini Apps integration, comparison vs ETH/SOL, getting started guide, risks, and 6 FAQs

Sui DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 (830+ lines): 8 sections covering blockchain overview, DeFi ecosystem metrics, top protocols (Suilend, Navi, Momentum, Cetus, Scallop, DeepBook), Move language advantages, comparison vs ETH/SOL, getting started guide, risks, and 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: TON page: title 'TON Blockchain DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026 | degen0x', target keywords: TON DeFi, STON.fi, DeDust, EVAA Protocol, Telegram Mini Apps, TON Connect
Sui page: title 'Sui DeFi Ecosystem Guide 2026: Complete Platform Overview | degen0x', target keywords: Sui DeFi, Suilend, Navi, Move language, Sui DeFi protocols
Both pages: Article + FAQ JSON-LD structured data schemas via generateArticleSchema/generateFAQSchema
Both pages: OpenGraph + Twitter card metadata, breadcrumb navigation, internal linking to /learn, /defi-yields, /tools/bridge-aggregator, /prices
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts

notes.publish_queue: Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in src/lib/published-pages.ts (batch 2 for March 28).
notes.import_fixes: Both pages had import patterns corrected to match codebase conventions (generateArticleSchema, generateFAQSchema, default StructuredData import, Metadata type annotation).
